{{CargoRelic
|name=Maitreya in Meditation
|class_id=22032
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=01-29
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On Jan 29, 600 AD, the Maitreya in Meditation Statue was crafted.<br>This statue was unearthed in Korea. It was a large-sized gilt-bronze statue made in the late stage of the Three Kingdoms era of Korea. It wears a three-hill-shaped headwear, thus, it's also known as the Three-hill Statue in Contemplation. The statue is the young Siddhartha who wears nothing on the upper half and hangs a ring on the neck. He wears a fancy kilt with the left foot on the pedestal and the right leg on the left one. His right-hand touches his jaw, eyes slightly open with a smile on his face. The lifelike statue exemplifies ancient people's incredible craftsmanship and is a national treasure.
|fame=22
|art=45
|fth=30
|civ=33
|tech=24
|ss1=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +1
|ss2=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +2
|ss3=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss4=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5
|ss7=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5<br>Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Biozilla skill I.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: This Relic's ART +5
}}
